title: Bharat Petroleum is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bharat Petroleum is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Petroleum:
Bharat Petroleum is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
